usage: clonePtnObj [-help] [-checkOnly] [-objs {all busGuides specialWires}] [-redo] [-refHinsts <list of hinst names>] [-skipCreateNewPartitionPorts] [-sync] [-targetHinsts <list of hinst names>] [-undo]

options.name: -checkOnly
options.description: Checks if master and clone partitions are out of sync or not

options.name: -objs
options.description: Specifies properties which are required to be synced

options.name: -redo
options.description: makes the changes done to busGuide again and brings user to next sync state

options.name: -refHinsts
options.description: Specifies name of the hinsts from whom objects will be copied to target_hinsts

options.name: -skipCreateNewPartitionPorts
options.description: specifies to skip create new partition ports during sync-up for top-level net passing over case

options.name: -sync
options.description: specifies if syncing of busGuide is required

options.name: -targetHinsts
options.description: Specifies name of hinsts to whome obj is copied from ref hinst

options.name: -undo
options.description: reverts the changes done to busGuide and brings user back to last sync state
